title: Remove deprecated ui-state.ts types
description: ui-state.ts has ~400 lines of types but only RoomSelectOption and SelectOption are actually imported by production code (RoomAutocomplete.tsx, RoomMultiSelect.tsx). Remove all dead type definitions and slim the file down to only what's used.

title: Delete unused example component files
description: Three example component files (~750 lines total) are unused: src/components/room/examples.tsx, src/features/schedule-arrangement/presentation/components/examples/DraggableSubjectCard.tsx, src/features/schedule-arrangement/presentation/components/examples/DroppableTimeslot.tsx
